steps.title: Set up the total salt from both experiments
steps.content:
If $x$ stations have Experiment A (6 teaspoons each) and the remaining $(5 - x)$ stations have Experiment B (4 teaspoons each), then:
$$\text{Total salt} = 6x + 4(5 - x)$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Expand and combine like terms:
$$6x + 4(5 - x) = 6x + 20 - 4x = 2x + 20$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
